query: SELECT id, sourceType, callStatus, LENGTH(transcript) as transcript_length FROM Calls WHERE sourceType = 'whatsapp_export' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JnT69AjTPMBmzj1.root --database Kz68s2pwfLAqNwAYGGvkHR --execute SELECT id, sourceType, callStatus, LENGTH(transcript) as transcript_length FROM Calls WHERE sourceType = 'whatsapp_export' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
